imports.description: Production-ready database stack for game platforms and web apps. Includes MariaDB 10.3, PostgreSQL 16, and Redis 7 templates for persistent storage, caching, and queue/session workloads.
Hytale-focused server image collection prepared for dedicated deployment and version experimentation, with startup settings aligned for sandbox testing and community server hosting.
Complete Minecraft ecosystem package: Vanilla, Paper, Forge, SpongeVanilla, and BungeeCord. Designed for survival, modded, and proxy-network deployments with broad version compatibility.
General-purpose utility services and custom workloads. Includes web hosting, VPS-style runtime templates, and code-server workflows for lightweight dev environments and maintenance tasks.
Dedicated Rust game server package optimized for quick provisioning, update/reinstall workflows, and community/modded gameplay environments.
Classic Source/GoldSrc game hosting bundle including CS:GO, Garry's Mod, Team Fortress 2, Insurgency, ARK, and custom Source-engine templates for legacy and modern communities.
Voice communication services for gaming communities, featuring TeamSpeak 3 and Mumble templates with persistent data support and easy connector-based deployment.
